since_last: 30% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.07%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +0.00% · Gold -0.60% · Nasdaq100 -0.94%. 30% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.07%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.07%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.20%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -8.07%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +5.71%, ISRG +3.05%, BIDU +2.89%, ZBRA +2.79%, INTU +2.45%. Laggards: SMR -8.07%, OKLO -7.97%, SKHY -7.53%, CEVA -7.50%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.10% at $135.41
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
